text.title: Playwright Automation Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the playwright-automation methodology end-to-end.

step.name: decide-playwright-vs-fetch
step.action: Apply the decision tree: server-rendered? → httpx/fetch. Needs JS execution or auth flow? → Playwright. Hard bot detection? → escalate.
step.decision-gate: If decision != Playwright, STOP and apply the corresponding methodology.

step.name: scaffold-config
step.action: Generate playwright.config.ts with use: { trace: 'on-first-retry', screenshot: 'only-on-failure' }. Set projects: chromium/firefox/webkit if cross-browser required.

step.name: write-auth-global-setup
step.input: PW_USER / PW_PASS env vars + login URL
step.action: Create tests/global-setup.ts that performs the login flow once and saves storageState to ./auth.json. Add auth.json to .gitignore.

step.name: write-spec-with-role-locators
step.action: Generate tests/<flow>.spec.ts using getByRole/getByLabel/getByText. One assertion per behaviour. No waitForTimeout.

step.name: validate-and-run-ci
step.action: Run scripts/validate-playwright-automation.py against the artefact metadata, then npx playwright test --reporter=line. Commit only after green.
step.decision-gate: If validator returns non-zero, fix violations before running tests.
